issues.description: File handle is never closed. Using open() without a context manager causes resource leaks.
issues.suggestion: Use 'with open(path, 'r') as file:' to ensure the file is closed.

issues.description: Path concatenation using + instead of os.path.join, which is not cross-platform safe.
issues.suggestion: Use os.path.join(directory, f) instead of string concatenation.

issues.description: Bare except clause silently swallows all exceptions including KeyboardInterrupt and SystemExit.
issues.suggestion: Catch specific exceptions: except json.JSONDecodeError: or except (json.JSONDecodeError, UnicodeDecodeError):

issues.description: File handle is never closed in write_output.
issues.suggestion: Use a context manager: with open(path, 'w') as f:

issues.description: Writing to /tmp with user-controlled filename could be a security risk (symlink attacks).
issues.suggestion: Use tempfile.mkstemp() or validate the filename.

issues.description: merge_json_files silently overwrites duplicate keys without warning.
issues.suggestion: Add conflict detection or a merge strategy parameter.
